Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)

Title: Dynamic Group Creation & Huntress Learner Sync Configuration for EBRMD
Notes: Configured a new Microsoft Entra ID Dynamic User Group specifically designed to include only licensed mailbox-enabled users. Created the group using a validated dynamic membership rule that filters for active, member-type accounts with an enabled Exchange Online service plan, ensuring only real, licensed users are included. After successfully creating and verifying the dynamic group membership logic, proceeded to integrate Huntress SAT with Microsoft Graph. In the Huntress portal, navigated to Integrations &rarr; Providers, selected the EBRMDtenant, and chose the newly created dynamic user group (EBRMD_Users) as the group to sync learners from. Enabled the option to exclude unlicensed and non-human learner identities, ensuring only properly licensed human users can be provisioned as Huntress learners. Confirmed that Use UPN as unique email address was selected to maintain identity accuracy. Activated Automatic Daily Sync so learner accounts are continuously updated based on group membership changes. Also enabled attribute sharing options (Status, First Name, Last Name, Employee ID, Department, Manager) and verified advanced settings related to learner activation/inactivation and department creation. Completed validation of the sync configuration to ensure that only authorized, licensed users will populate within Huntress SAT moving forward.
